description.short: Your AI workforce, in Teams — @-mention an agent and it does the real work.
description.full: Kortix brings a workforce of AI agents into Microsoft Teams. Add the bot to a chat or channel, @-mention it with a task, and an agent gets on it — working across your connected tools and replying right here as it goes, with live progress. Follow-ups stay in the same conversation. Managed by Kortix · https://kortix.com
